## Organization

- Name:
- 501(c)(3) status (or international equivalent):
- Mission focus relevant to MCAS / mast-cell disease:
- Website:

## Type of engagement

- [ ] Fiscal sponsorship (we are not yet a 501(c)(3))
- [ ] Funding a wet-lab validation campaign ($5–25k range)
- [ ] Funding patient-data infrastructure ($10–40k range)
- [ ] Cloud compute underwriting ($1–10k / year)
- [ ] Volunteer coordination (clinician outreach, patient community)
- [ ] Co-applying on a grant
- [ ] In-kind support (cell lines, data, expertise)
- [ ] Other:

## Constraints

- Reporting cadence required:
- Co-branding expectations:
- Authorship expectations:
- Any IP / exclusivity expectations? (we cannot accept exclusivity)

## Timeline

When would you want to engage?
